questionText: Provide, in metric tons CO2, gross masses of CO2 transferred in and out of the reporting organization (as defined by the consolidation basis).
questionKo: (연결 기준에 따라 정의된) 보고 귀사 내외로 이동된 CO2의 총 질량을 미터톤 CO2 단위로 제공하세요
simpleHelp: CCS/U is beginning to be demonstrated across the world on a variety of sources and scales. Investors and data users are interested in CO2 transfers in and out of the organization to make useful comparisons of CCS/U projects.

columns.text: CO2 transferred in the reporting year (metric tons CO2)

options: Transfer from a flue gas system
Purchase from a naturally-occurring underground source
Transfer from another company under a storage agreement
Sold to the market for use in commercial products
Sold to the market as a feedstock to other chemical or industrial processes
Transferred to another company for acid gas injection (CO2 and H2S co-injected into a production reservoir)
Transferred to another company for enhanced oil recovery (EOR) operations
Transferred to another company for enhanced shale gas recovery (ESGR) operations
Transferred to another company for other enhanced gas recovery (EGR) operations
Transferred to another company for enhanced coal bed methane (ECBM) operations
optionsKo: Transfer 에서 an기타 comp하나 이상 under storage agreement
Sold 시장 feedstock 기타 chemical 또는 industrial 프로세스
Transferred an기타 comp하나 이상 acid gas injection (CO2 및 H2S co-injected into production reservoir)
Transferred an기타 comp하나 이상 enhanced oil recovery (EOR) operations
Transferred an기타 comp하나 이상 enhanced shale gas recovery (ESGR) operations
Transferred an기타 comp하나 이상 기타 enhanced gas recovery (EGR) operations
Transferred an기타 comp하나 이상 enhanced 석탄 bed methane (ECBM) operations

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to 7.66.
guidance.textKo: - 이 문항은 선행 문항의 응답에 따라 표시 여부 또는 입력 범위가 달라질 수 있습니다. - 선행 문항의 응답을 수정하면 이 문항 또는 후속 문항의 기존 입력값이 초기화될 수 있으므로 제출 전 함께 확인하십시오.

guidance.text:
CO2 transferred in the reporting year (Column 2) 
Enter in metric tons the gross total CO2 transferred into (row 1) or out of (row 2) your organizational boundary (as defined by your answer to 6.1) in the reporting year. 
Type(s) of CO2 transfer (column 3) 
Select the reason(s) for the transfer of CO2 into (row 1) or out of (row 2) your organizational boundary from the list of transfer types provided, or use "Other, please specify". 
Examples of transfers of CO2 into an organization (row 1) 
Transfer from a flue gas stream - CO2 is transferred into the organizational boundary, post-combustion, from the exhaust/stack/flue gas stream of a combustion process (e.g., power station). 
Transfer from an industrial process - CO2 is transferred into the organizational boundary, often pre-combustion, from an industrial process such as ammonia manufacturing, fermentation, hydrogen production, cement manufacturing, steel manufacturing etc. 
Purchase from a naturally-occurring underground source: CO2 is purchased by the organization from naturally occurring underground CO2 deposits. 
Transfer from another company under a storage agreement: CO2 is transferred into the organizational boundary from another company for the purposes of sequestration/injection and long-term storage. 
Examples of transfers of CO2 out of an organization (row 2) 
Sold to the market for use in commercial products: CO2 is sold for use in products such as carbonated beverages, dry ice, fire extinguisher agents, refrigerants, laboratory gas, grain infestation treatment, solvents etc. 
Sold to the market as a feedstock to other chemical or industrial processes: CO2 is sold for use as a feedstock to processes such as urea fertilizer production, methanol production, crop cultivation in greenhouses etc. 
Transferred to another company for acid gas injection: CO2 is transferred out of the organizational boundary to be co-injected with H2S into a production reservoir. 
Transferred to another company for enhanced oil recovery (EOR) operations: CO2 is transferred out of the organizational boundary to a third party for the purpose of EOR via CO2 injection. Do not select this option for CO2 used for your organization's own EOR operations. 
Transferred to another company for enhanced shale gas recovery (ESGR) operations: CO2 is transferred out of the organizational boundary to a third party for the purpose of recovering natural gas trapped in shale formations. Do not select this option for CO2 used for your organization's own ESGR operations. 
Transferred to another company for other enhanced gas recovery (EGR) operations: CO2 is transferred out of the organizational boundary to a third party for the purpose of EOR via CO2 injection. Do not select this option for CO2 used for your organization's own EOR operations. 
Transferred to another company for enhanced coal bed methane (ECBM) operations: CO2 is transferred out of the organizational boundary to a third party for the purpose of ECBM via CO2 injection. Do not select this option for CO2 used for your organization's own ECBM operations.
guidance.textKo: - 응답방법과 열 구조에 따라 해당 배출량, 에너지, 목표 또는 성과 지표를 입력하십시오. - 수치는 문항에서 요구하는 단위와 보고연도 기준을 일관되게 적용하십시오. - 산정에 사용한 방법론, 배출계수, 제외 범위 또는 추정 기준이 있다면 설명 입력란에 근거를 남기십시오.

guidance.text: Companies are transparent about CO2 transfers in and out of their reporting boundary.
guidance.textKo: 기업 transparent about CO2 transfers 및 out 의 their 보고경계.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점 부여됨 per 완료 셀 proportion 숫자 입력 의 셀 displayed. 이 문항에서 최대 4/4점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Table completed - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Table 완료 - 1 점 이 문항에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Types of CO2 transfer' in both rows- 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 다음을 제외한 선택지 중 하나 '기타, 직접 입력' 열에서 선택 'Types 의 CO2 transfer' 모두 행- 1 점 이 문항에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다.

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 기후변화 관련 배출량, 에너지 사용, 목표, 감축활동 및 성과 지표를 확인하는 항목입니다. 응답 시 단위, 산정범위, 배출계수, 보고연도 및 검증 여부를 일관되게 작성하십시오. 문항명: (연결 기준에 따라 정의된) 보고 귀사 내외로 이동된 CO2의 총 질량을 미터톤 CO2 단위로 제공하세요
